q: Mg Mg doesn't speak English and neither does Su Su.
a: Neither Mg Mg nor Su Su speaks English.

q: Mg Ba is not lazy and neither is Mg Mg.
a: Neither Mg Ba nor Mg Mg is lazy.

q: Both Mya Mya and Hla Hla were not there.
a: Neither Mya Mya nor Hla Hla was there.

q: I don't like tea. My sister doesn't like it either.
a: Neither I nor my sister likes tea.

q: Both Ko Ko and Nyi Nyi were absent.
a: Neither Ko Ko nor Nyi Nyi was present.

q: Khun San Law did not love the scheming girl. He did not want to marry her.
a: Khun San Law neither loved the scheming girl nor wanted to marry her.

q: My sister and I do not like tea.
a: Neither my sister nor I like tea.

q: Students cannot eat as well as sleep during an examination.
a: Students can neither eat nor sleep during an examination.

q: He didn't apologise and he didn't explain why he was late.
a: He neither apologised nor explained why he was late.

q: He did not return the goods and he also did not pay the bill.
a: He neither returned the goods nor paid the bill.

q: Ngato had no fingers and he also had no toes.
a: Ngato had neither fingers nor toes.

q: Min Din does not have stamina and he also does not have the willpower to work hard.
a: Min Din has neither stamina nor the willpower to work hard.

q: The students have not read the book. The teacher has not read the book.
a: Neither the students nor the teacher has read the book.

q: Pi Lun and Pi Laing had never seen an orchid before.
a: Neither Pi Lun nor Pi Laing had ever seen an orchid before.

q: He does not have a car and he also does not have a house.
a: He has neither a car nor a house.

q: I haven't got the time to go on a vacation. I also haven't got the money.
a: I have got neither the time nor the money to go on a vacation.

q: English as well as History is not a science subject.
a: Neither English nor History is a science subject.

q: He didn't explain his behaviour and he didn't apologize for it.
a: He neither explained nor apologized for his behaviour.

q: Both Moe Hein and Zaw Htay did not finish their work.
a: Neither Moe Hein nor Zaw Htay finished his work.

q: Both Naing Naing and Kyaing Kyaing did not take part in the school sports.
a: Neither Naing Naing nor Kyaing Kyaing took part in the school sports.

q: I will not help you to disobey your parents and I will not report on you.
a: I will neither help you to disobey your parents nor report on you.

q: Both the students and the class teacher are not happy with the examination results.
a: Neither the students nor the class teacher is happy with the examination results.

q: He didn't explain his behaviour and he didn't apologize for it.
a: He neither explained his behaviour nor apologized for it.

q: Maung Maung was not my classmate. Aung Aung was not my classmate.
a: Neither Maung Maung nor Aung Aung was my classmate.

q: Both Mya Mya and Hla Hla have not been chosen to participate in the competition.
a: Neither Mya Mya nor Hla Hla has been chosen to participate in the competition.

q: Both Mya Mya and Hla Hla were not there.
a: Neither Mya Mya nor Hla Hla was there.

q: They haven't got the time to go on a vacation. They haven't got the money, either.
a: They have got neither the time nor the money to go on a vacation.

q: She does not believe him and neither do we.
a: Neither she nor we believe him.

q: They do not know his name. They do not know his address.
a: They know neither his name nor his address.

q: The hotel was not clean and it was not comfortable.
a: The hotel was neither clean nor comfortable.

q: Human beings cannot live on the moon. Animals cannot live on the moon.
a: Neither human beings nor animals can live on the moon.

q: Not only the worm but also the snail does not have a backbone.
a: Neither the worm nor the snail has a backbone.

q: Both Yu Yu and Nu Nu don't eat any meat.
a: Neither Yu Yu nor Nu Nu eats any meat.

q: The ox does not have upper teeth. The horse does not have upper teeth.
a: Neither the ox nor the horse has upper teeth.

q: My mother doesn't like coffee and I don't like it either.
a: Neither my mother nor I like coffee.

q: Both the students and the class teacher are not happy with the examination results.
a: Neither the students nor the class teacher is happy with the examination results.

q: Nyo Mee does not like chocolate. Sandar does not like chocolate.
a: Neither Nyo Mee nor Sandar likes chocolate.
